mapper.select: select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_member where created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') order by label

select to_char(updated_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_member where member_status != 'active' and updated_datetime >= #{startAt} and updated_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(updated_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') order by label

select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_member where created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') order by label

select to_char(updated_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_member where member_status != 'active' and updated_datetime >= #{startAt} and updated_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(updated_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') order by label
select cast(member_role as text) as label, count(*) as value from tbl_member group by member_role order by value desc, label asc

select cast(extract(hour from last_login_at) as text) as label, count(*) as value from tbl_member where last_login_at is not null and last_login_at >= #{startAt} and last_login_at < #{endAt} group by extract(hour from last_login_at) order by cast(extract(hour from last_login_at) as integer)

select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_post where post_status = 'active' and reply_post_id is null and created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') order by label

select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_post where post_status = 'active' and reply_post_id is null and created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') order by label

select coalesce(c.category_name, '일반') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_post p left join tbl_post_product pp on pp.id = p.id left join tbl_category c on c.id = pp.product_category_id where p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is null and p.created_datetime >= #{startAt} and p.created_datetime < #{endAt} group by coalesce(c.category_name, '일반') order by value desc, label asc limit 7

select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_report where created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') order by label

select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_report where created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') order by label
select cast(status as text) as label, count(*) as value from tbl_report group by status order by value desc, label asc

select case when char_length(reason) > 20 then substr(reason, 1, 20) || '...' else reason end as label, count(*) as value from tbl_report where target_type = #{targetType}::report_target_type group by case when char_length(reason) > 20 then substr(reason, 1, 20) || '...' else reason end order by value desc, label asc limit 5
